graph_explanation_level: summarize matched nodes and rejected candidates without exposing raw candidate slides as selectable templates
user_confirmation_points: before full-deck build when style direction is ambiguous
before promoting any reference slide into template patterns or runtime templates
default_assumptions: Ask early when design intent is missing.
Show graph-backed template or pattern choices when the user wants control.
Keep raw references out of runtime template selection.
fallback_rules: If graph artifacts are missing, use JSON catalogs and explain the limitation.
If pattern catalog is empty, rely on production templates and Design DNA.
If user does not confirm promotion, keep references in library metadata only.
